mapper.insert: /*RwdMapper.insertRwdMember*/ INSERT INTO MSP_RWD_INFO_OUT ( RWD_INFO_OUT_SEQ , RWD_SEQ , RES_NO , REQUEST_KEY , CONTRACT_NUM , INFO_OUT_TYPE , RWD_PROD_CD , RWD_PROD_NM , RWD_PRIC , RWD_PRD , OPEN_DT , DVC_CHG_DT , REQ_DTTM , RWD_STAT_CD , CUST_TYPE , BIRTH_DT , REQ_BUY_TYPE , MODEL_ID , MODEL_NM , INTM_SRL_NO , IMEI , IMEI_TWO , PRDT_LNCH_DT , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , BUY_PRIC , CHN_CD , FILE_ID , FILE_DIR , FILE_EXT , REGST_DTTM , PROC_YN , PROC_DT ) SELECT RWD_INFO_OUT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, RWD_SEQ, RES_NO, REQUEST_KEY, CONTRACT_NUM, INFO_OUT_TYPE, RWD_PROD_CD, RWD_PROD_NM, BASE_AMT, RWD_PRD, LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, DVC_CHG_DT, REQ_DTTM, RWD_STAT_CD, CSTMR_TYPE, BIRTH_DT, REQ_BUY_TYPE, MODEL_ID, MODEL_NAME, INTM_SRL_NO, IMEI, IMEI_TWO, PRDT_LNCH_DT, OUT_UNIT_PRIC, BUY_PRIC, CHN_CD, FILE_ID, FILE_DIR, FILE_EXT, REGST_DTTM, PROC_YN, PROC_DT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.RWD_SEQ , C.RES_NO , C.REQUEST_KEY , B.CONTRACT_NUM , '1' AS INFO_OUT_TYPE , A.RWD_PROD_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RWD_PROD_CD) AS RWD_PROD_NM , E.BASE_AMT , D.RWD_PRD , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , SUBSTR(MAX(F.APPL_STRT_DTTM) OVER(PARTITION BY F.CONTRACT_NUM), 0, 8) AS DVC_CHG_DT , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQ_DTTM , '0' AS RWD_STAT_CD , C.CSTMR_TYPE , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT , C.REQ_BUY_TYPE , B.MODEL_ID , B.MODEL_NAME , B.INTM_SRL_NO , A.IMEI , A.IMEI_TWO , (SELECT PRDT_LNCH_DT FROM CMN_INTM_MDL WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.MODEL_ID AND RPRS_YN = 'Y') AS PRDT_LNCH_DT , (SELECT TO_CHAR(OUT_UNIT_PRIC) FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT WHERE B.MODEL_ID = RPRS_PRDT_ID AND TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM) AS OUT_UNIT_PRIC , A.BUY_PRIC , A.CHN_CD , A.FILE_ID , A.FILE_DIR , A.FILE_EXT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DTTM , 'N' AS PROC_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PROC_DT FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_REQUEST_DTL C , MSP_RWD_MST D , MSP_RATE_MST E , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST F WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = D.RWD_PROD_CD AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = E.RATE_CD AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = F.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND F.REQUEST_KEY(+) IS NOT NULL AND F.APPL_END_DTTM(+) >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-7, 'YYYYMMDD' ) || '000000' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1, 'YYYYMMDD' ) || '235959' AND A.IF_TRGT_CD = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND RWD_PROD_CD = A.RWD_PROD_CD AND IMEI = A.IMEI AND RWD_STAT_CD IN ('0', '1')) AND A.FILE_DIR IS NOT NULL -- 구매영수증 체크 )

/*RwdMapper.insertRwdImg*/ INSERT INTO MSP_RWD_FILE_OUT ( RWD_FILE_OUT_SEQ , RWD_SEQ , FILE_ID , FILE_DIR , FILE_EXT , REGST_DTTM , PROC_YN , PROC_DT ) SELECT RWD_FILE_OUT_SEQ.NEXTVAL , A.RWD_SEQ , A.FILE_ID , A.FILE_DIR , A.FILE_EXT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , 'N' , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER A, MSP_RWD_INFO_OUT B WHERE A.RWD_SEQ = B.RWD_SEQ AND B.PROC_YN = 'N' AND B.PROC_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_RWD_FILE_OUT WHERE RWD_SEQ = A.RWD_SEQ)
mapper.select: /*RwdMapper.getRwdIfOut*/ SELECT A.RWD_INFO_OUT_SEQ , A.RWD_SEQ , NVL(A.RES_NO, ' ') AS RES_NO , NVL(A.REQUEST_KEY, 0) AS REQUEST_KEY , NVL(A.CONTRACT_NUM, ' ') AS CONTRACT_NUM , NVL(A.INFO_OUT_TYPE, ' ') AS INFO_OUT_TYPE , NVL(A.RWD_PROD_CD, ' ') AS RWD_PROD_CD , NVL(A.RWD_PROD_NM, ' ') AS RWD_PROD_NM , NVL(A.RWD_PRIC, 0) AS RWD_PRIC , NVL(A.RWD_PRD, ' ') AS RWD_PRD , NVL(A.OPEN_DT, ' ') AS OPEN_DT , NVL(A.DVC_CHG_DT, ' ') AS DVC_CHG_DT , NVL(A.REQ_DTTM, ' ') AS REQ_DTTM , NVL(A.CAN_DTTM, ' ') AS CAN_DTTM , NVL(A.STRT_DTTM, ' ') AS STRT_DTTM , NVL(A.END_DTTM, ' ') AS END_DTTM , NVL(A.RWD_STAT_CD, ' ') AS RWD_STAT_CD , NVL(B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, ' ') AS CTN , NVL(A.CUST_TYPE, ' ') AS CUST_TYPE , NVL(B.SUB_LINK_NAME, ' ') AS CUST_NM , NVL(A.BIRTH_DT, ' ') AS BIRTH_DT , NVL(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, ' ') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE , NVL(A.MODEL_ID, ' ') AS MODEL_ID , NVL(A.MODEL_NM, ' ') AS MODEL_NM , NVL(A.INTM_SRL_NO, ' ') AS INTM_SRL_NO , NVL(A.IMEI, ' ') AS IMEI , NVL(A.IMEI_TWO, ' ') AS IMEI_TWO , NVL(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN, ' ') AS BAN_ADDR , NVL(A.PRDT_LNCH_DT, ' ') AS PRDT_LNCH_DT , NVL(A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC, 0) AS OUT_UNIT_PRIC , NVL(A.BUY_PRIC, 0) AS BUY_PRIC , NVL(A.CHN_CD, ' ') AS CHN_CD , NVL(A.CAN_RSLT_CD, ' ') AS CAN_RSLT_CD , NVL(A.FILE_ID, ' ') AS FILE_ID , NVL(A.FILE_DIR, ' ') AS FILE_DIR , NVL(A.FILE_EXT, ' ') AS FILE_EXT , NVL(A.REGST_DTTM, ' ') AS REGST_DTTM , NVL(A.PROC_YN, ' ') AS PROC_YN , NVL(A.PROC_DT, ' ') AS PROC_DT , ' ' AS IF_TRGT_CD , ' ' AS OPEN_AGENT_CD , ' ' AS OPEN_AGENT FROM MSP_RWD_INFO_OUT A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.BAN = C.BAN AND A.PROC_YN = 'N' AND A.RWD_STAT_CD IN ('0') AND A.REQ_DTTM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -7, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYYMMDD')

/*RwdMapper.getImageFileUpList*/ SELECT RWD_FILE_OUT_SEQ , RWD_SEQ , FILE_ID , FILE_DIR , FILE_EXT , REGST_DTTM , PROC_YN , PROC_DT , (SELECT HOST_UP_DIR FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_FILE WHERE PARTNER_ID = 'winiaaid' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS HOST_UP_DIR , (SELECT SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_RWD_ORDER RWD WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = RWD.CONTRACT_NUM AND RWD.RWD_SEQ = FOUT.RWD_SEQ) AS CTN , (SELECT RATE.RATE_NM FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER RWD , MSP_RATE_MST RATE WHERE RWD.RWD_PROD_CD = RATE.RATE_CD AND RWD_SEQ = FOUT.RWD_SEQ) AS RWD_PROD_NM FROM MSP_RWD_FILE_OUT FOUT WHERE PROC_YN = 'N' AND PROC_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.update: /*RwdMapper.uptRwdUpList*/ UPDATE MSP_RWD_ORDER SET IF_TRGT_CD = 'S' , VRFY_RSLT_CD = 'Z' , RVISN_ID = 'BATCH_REQ' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RWD_SEQ = #{rwdSeq}

/*RwdMapper.updateResult*/ UPDATE MSP_RWD_ORDER SET VRFY_RSLT_CD = trim(#{vrfyRsltCd}) , VRFY_DTTM = trim(#{vrfyDttm}) , VRFY_ID = trim(#{vrfyId}) , RMK = trim(#{rmk}) , RVISN_ID = 'BATCH_RES' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RWD_SEQ = #{rwdSeq}
mapper.insert: /*RwdMapper.insertRwdSub*/ INSERT INTO MSP_RWD_MEMBER ( RWD_SEQ , RWD_PROD_CD , RES_NO , REQUEST_KEY , CONTRACT_NUM , REQ_DTTM , RWD_STAT_CD , CHN_CD , DVC_CHG_DT , OPEN_DT , BIRTH_DT , MODEL_NM , MODEL_ID , INTM_SRL_NO , IMEI , IMEI_TWO , PRDT_LNCH_DT , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , BUY_PRIC , FILE_ID , FILE_EXT , FILE_DIR , CAN_RSLT_CD , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT B.RWD_SEQ , B.RWD_PROD_CD , B.RES_NO , B.REQUEST_KEY , B.CONTRACT_NUM , TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') , '0' , B.CHN_CD , B.DVC_CHG_DT , B.OPEN_DT , B.BIRTH_DT , B.MODEL_NM , B.MODEL_ID , B.INTM_SRL_NO , B.IMEI , B.IMEI_TWO , B.PRDT_LNCH_DT , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , B.BUY_PRIC , B.FILE_ID , B.FILE_EXT , B.FILE_DIR , B.CAN_RSLT_CD , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER A , MSP_RWD_INFO_OUT B WHERE A.RWD_SEQ = B.RWD_SEQ AND A.VRFY_RSLT_CD = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER WHERE RWD_SEQ = A.RWD_SEQ)
mapper.select: /*RwdMapper.selectRwdOrder*/ SELECT A.RWD_SEQ , B.CONTRACT_NUM , A.RWD_PROD_CD , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0258' AND CD_VAL = A.RWD_PROD_CD) AS RWD_PROD_NM , B.SVC_CNTR_NO AS NCN , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , B.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.REQ_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.RWD_STAT_CD = '0' -- 0:처리중, 1:가입, 2:해지 AND (A.RSLT_CD IS NULL OR A.RSLT_CD != '0000')

/*RwdMapper.selectAddSub*/ SELECT A.RWD_SEQ , B.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_DATE , B.EXPIRATION_DATE AS EXPIRATION_DATE FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER A, MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = B.SOC AND A.RSLT_CD = '0000' AND B.EFFECTIVE_DATE < B.EXPIRATION_DATE AND A.STRT_DTTM IS NULL

/*RwdMapper.selectAddCan*/ SELECT A.RWD_SEQ , B.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_DATE , B.EXPIRATION_DATE AS EXPIRATION_DATE FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER A, MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = B.SOC AND A.RWD_STAT_CD != '2' AND B.EXPIRATION_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-7, 'YYYYMMDD' ) || '000000' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1, 'YYYYMMDD' ) || '235959'

/*RwdMapper.getRwdIfOutAdd*/ SELECT A.RWD_SEQ , NVL(A.RES_NO, ' ') AS RES_NO , NVL(A.REQUEST_KEY, 0) AS REQUEST_KEY , NVL(A.CONTRACT_NUM, ' ') AS CONTRACT_NUM , NVL(A.RWD_PROD_CD, ' ') AS RWD_PROD_CD , NVL(A.RWD_PROD_NM, ' ') AS RWD_PROD_NM , NVL(A.RWD_PRIC, 0) AS RWD_PRIC , NVL(A.RWD_PRD, ' ') AS RWD_PRD , NVL(A.OPEN_DT, ' ') AS OPEN_DT , NVL(A.DVC_CHG_DT, ' ') AS DVC_CHG_DT , NVL(A.REQ_DTTM, ' ') AS REQ_DTTM , NVL(A.CAN_DTTM, ' ') AS CAN_DTTM , NVL(A.STRT_DTTM, ' ') AS STRT_DTTM , NVL(A.END_DTTM, ' ') AS END_DTTM , NVL(A.RWD_STAT_CD, ' ') AS RWD_STAT_CD , NVL(B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, ' ') AS CTN , NVL(A.CUST_TYPE, ' ') AS CUST_TYPE , NVL(B.SUB_LINK_NAME, ' ') AS CUST_NM , NVL(A.BIRTH_DT, ' ') AS BIRTH_DT , NVL(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, ' ') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE , NVL(A.MODEL_ID, ' ') AS MODEL_ID , NVL(A.MODEL_NM, ' ') AS MODEL_NM , NVL(A.INTM_SRL_NO, ' ') AS INTM_SRL_NO , NVL(A.IMEI, ' ') AS IMEI , NVL(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN, ' ') AS BAN_ADDR , NVL(A.PRDT_LNCH_DT, ' ') AS PRDT_LNCH_DT , NVL(A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC, 0) AS OUT_UNIT_PRIC , NVL(A.BUY_PRIC, 0) AS BUY_PRIC , NVL(A.CHN_CD, ' ') AS CHN_CD , NVL(A.CAN_RSLT_CD, ' ') AS CAN_RSLT_CD FROM MSP_RWD_INFO_OUT A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B. CONTRACT_NUM AND B.BAN = C.BAN AND A.RSLT_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.insert: /*RwdMapper.insertRwdBillPymn*/ INSERT INTO MSP_RWD_BILL_OUT ( RWD_BILL_OUT_SEQ , RWD_SEQ , BILL_YM , BLPYM_DATE , CONTRACT_NUM , OPEN_DT , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , BILL_ACNT_NO , BILL_ITEM_CD , ITEM_CD_NM , PYMN_CD , PYMN_AMNT , VAT_AMNT , PYMN_MTHD_CD , PYMN_MTHD_NM , ADJS_RSN_CD , ADJS_RSN_NM , REGST_DTTM , PROC_YN ) SELECT RWD_BILL_OUT_SEQ.NEXTVAL , B.RWD_SEQ , A.BILL_YM , A.BLPYM_DATE , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.OPEN_DT , B.STRT_DTTM , B.END_DTTM , A.BILL_ACNT_NO , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , A.ITEM_CD_NM , A.PYMN_CD , A.PYMN_AMNT , A.VAT_AMNT , A.PYMN_MTHD_CD , A.PYMN_MTHD_NM , A.ADJS_RSN_CD , A.ADJS_RSN_NM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , 'N' FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A, MSP_RWD_MEMBER B WHERE A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-1), 'YYYYMM') AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ('DRKIP','DRKIQ','DRKIR')
mapper.select: /*RwdMapper.getBillPymn*/ SELECT RWD_SEQ , NVL(BILL_YM, ' ') AS BILL_YM , NVL(BLPYM_DATE, ' ') AS BLPYM_DATE , NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, ' ') AS CONTRACT_NUM , NVL(OPEN_DT, ' ') AS OPEN_DT , SUBSTR(STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) AS STRT_DTTM , SUBSTR(END_DTTM, 1, 8) AS END_DTTM , NVL(BILL_ACNT_NO, ' ') AS BILL_ACNT_NO , NVL(BILL_ITEM_CD, ' ') AS BILL_ITEM_CD , NVL(ITEM_CD_NM, ' ') AS ITEM_CD_NM , NVL(PYMN_CD, ' ') AS PYMN_CD , NVL(PYMN_AMNT, 0) AS PYMN_AMNT , NVL(VAT_AMNT, 0) AS VAT_AMNT , NVL(PYMN_MTHD_CD, ' ') AS PYMN_MTHD_CD , NVL(PYMN_MTHD_NM, ' ') AS PYMN_MTHD_NM , NVL(ADJS_RSN_CD, ' ') AS ADJS_RSN_CD , NVL(ADJS_RSN_NM, ' ') AS ADJS_RSN_NM FROM MSP_RWD_BILL_OUT WHERE PROC_YN = 'N' AND REGST_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
